---
title: "Contact Information"
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'contact_info.html'))})
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    css: "style.css"
---

</center>

</div>
<div style="margin-left:20px;">
</div>

[am2883@cornell.edu]()

</div>
<div style="margin-left:20px;">
</div>

Warren Hall 442

</div>
<div style="margin-left:20px;">
</div>

Cornell University

</div>
<div style="margin-left:20px;">
</div>

Ithaca, NY 14853-6201

</div>
<div style="margin-left:20px;">
</div>

</center>
